title: Kenyan Vegetarian Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful vegetarian stew inspired by Kenyan cuisine, featuring a pungent blend of spices.

ingredients.name: pungent
ingredients.notes: Use a mix of garlic, ginger, and onions

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the pungent spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef broth, Kenyan spice blend, and chopped carrots and potatoes.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
